# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build and Test

on:
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout PR code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Run tests
        id: run-tests
        run: |
          npm test || echo "Tests failed"

      - name: Post results as comment
        if: always()
        uses: actions/github-script@v6
        with:
          script: |
            const { exec } = require("child_process");
            const { promisify } = require("util");
            const execPromise = promisify(exec);
            const result = await execPromise("npm test");
            const message = result.stdout || "No output available";
            const issueComment = context.payload.pull_request.number;
            await github.issues.createComment({
              ...context.repo,
              issue_number: issueComment,
              body: `### Test Results\n\n```\n${message}\n```\n`
            });
